---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new capability, enhancement, or architectural refinement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: []
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I cannot save..."

### Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how it improves the enterprise workflow or analytics pipeline.

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### Architectural Impact
What parts of the stack are affected?
- [ ] Frontend UI Components
- [ ] Backend API / Routes
- [ ] Database Schema (PostgreSQL migrations)
- [ ] Cache layer (Redis storage/rate limiting)
- [ ] AI Copilot Grounding Context

### Additional Context
Add any other context, designs, mockups, or workflows here.
